title: Physical, Service, and Performance Troubleshooting · Protocol Clinic: Net Poe Transceiver Faults
summary: Resolve a multi-symptom campus incident across cabling, interfaces, switching, routing, addressing, wireless, and application performance. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net poe transceiver faults increment in an evidence-backed incident resolution packet. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Diagnose PoE budget or standard problems and transceiver protocol, wavelength, fiber, distance, and signal mismatches.
Interpret CRC, runts, giants, drops, errors, negotiation, and port status trends with time and traffic context.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
